'''Selab''' was a planet in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]] famed for its [[Tree of wisdom|trees of wisdom]]. The crystal domes on the [[Star Home]] came from Selab.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
